heading: Forgiveness of outstanding advances
label: 3505 Forgiveness of outstanding advances
text: In accordance with accounting and other procedures the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development prescribes, each advance made by the Secretary under this chapter that had any principal amount outstanding on , was forgiven. The terms and conditions of any contract, or any amendment to a contract, for that advance with respect to any promise to repay the advance were canceled.February 5, 1988
